summary: collection::create_index should return server response
description: See TODO in collection.cpp

summary: I think some similar issue still exists.
description:
Sorry I don't know how to reopen this issue.
So please see at this new comment, Thank you:

https://jira.mongodb.org/browse/CXX-660?focusedCommentId=1042219&page=com.atlassian.jira.plugin.system.issuetabpanels:comment-tabpanel#comment-1042219

summary: specified timeouts with chrono
description: See discussion at the end of [this pull request|https://github.com/mongodb/mongo-cxx-driver/pull/363#issuecomment-160325319].

summary: Audit construction, copy, move and destruction of bsoncxx::v0::types::value
Cmake/Make parallelized build fails
description:
When generating makefiles with CMake, a paralleized build such as "make -j8" does not work because the examples tries to compile over a local installation which is not finished yet.

This can be solved by adding the right dependencies.

summary: C++ driver fails to build when ssl is disabled on the C driver
Determine return type of write_concern::tag
description: See TODO in write_concern.cpp

summary: CMake path incorrect when subproject
description: src/mongocxx/test/CMakeLists.txt contains the variable CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR, which has the incorrect value when mongo-cxx-driver is a CMake subproject.

summary: Drivers must raise an error if response messageLength > ismaster.maxMessageSizeBytes
client::database() should raise an exception if client is unitialized
description: If the database method of the client class is called for a client that is not properly initialized, the call segfaults. A check should be added for this condition and the error should be handled gracefully.

summary: Doxygen documentation does not include all directories
description:
The documentation seems to be missing things for some base classes like Status, see

https://groups.google.com/forum/#!topic/mongodb-user/l3yPp0wAgBo

summary: multithreaded application hangs during bulk load

We have a multi-threaded app doing bulk loading (each thread loading different set of data), with 10 thread, all threads are hanging with the same call stack.

#1  0x00007f291f2d36cf in mongo::Socket::_recv(char*, int) () from /opt/mtx/lib/libmongoclient.so

#4  0x00007f291f2cb514 in mongo::MessagingPort::recv(mongo::Message&) () from /opt/mtx/lib/libmongoclient.so
#5  0x00007f291f2cc4c2 in mongo::MessagingPort::recv(mongo::Message const&, mongo::Message&) () from /opt/mtx/lib/libmongoclient.so
#6  0x00007f291f25c629 in mongo::DBClientConnection::call(mongo::Message&, mongo::Message&, bool, std::basic_string<char, std::char_traits<char>, std::allocator<char> >*) () from /opt/mtx/lib/libmongoclient.so

summary: Number of 'const' qualifiers in return values
Evergreen and travis builds should also run the bsoncxx unit tests
description: Currently, we only run the driver tests and run the examples, but we should also run the bsoncxx unit tests.

summary: Remove deprecated 'implementation' methods from all classes
description:
The ::implementation methods were there to facilitate drilling down to the C driver implementation when the C++11 driver interface was far from complete, as it was the only way to achieve some tasks.

As that is no longer the case, we should remove them everywhere.

summary: bulk_write constructor should take an enum not a boolean
Updating entire document without operators such as set fails at execution with Cannot do an empty bulk write
Improve move semantics of model::write
description: See TODO in bulk_write.cpp

summary: Printing the inserted IDs returned by a bulk_write throws
Update insert_many test in test/collection.cpp
description: This test is commented out and is out-of-date.

summary: coll.drop() throws if collection doesn't exist
description: Currently, you must surround calls to coll.drop() with a check to see if the collection exists before trying to drop it.  It seems like this shouldn't be necessary.

summary: bsoncxx::view_or_value should have private members
description: This class' members were exposed as protected to support string::view_or_value's c_str() method.  If possible this method should be changed so that bsoncxx::view_or_value's can once again be private.

summary: Set the ABI version of the 3.0.0 release to something indicating the lack of a stable ABI
description: Right now we are setting a SOVERSION of 0, advertising an ABI. We should instead advertise an SOVERSION that explicitly indicates that no stable ABI is expected.

summary: "Hello World" core dumps if the C++11 driver was built from current master version
description:
I've encountered this during my work on a CS ticket. I wasn't able to make the C++11 driver work on Linux, nor on OSX. Another engineer built it on his machine and faced the same problem.

Raising this ticket to make the issue visible.

{noformat}
Program received signal SIGSEGV, Segmentation fault.
0x00007ffff7bcd703 in mongocxx::v0::database::database(mongocxx::v0::client const&, core::v1::basic_string_view<char, std::char_traits<char> >) ()
   from /usr/local/lib/libmongocxx.so.0
(gdb) where
#0  0x00007ffff7bcd703 in mongocxx::v0::database::database(mongocxx::v0::client const&, core::v1::basic_string_view<char, std::char_traits<char> >) ()
   from /usr/local/lib/libmongocxx.so.0
#1  0x00007ffff7bc8c30 in mongocxx::v0::client::database(core::v1::basic_string_view<char, std::char_traits<char> >) const & () from /usr/local/lib/libmongocxx.so.0
#2  0x00000000004016f3 in ?? ()
#3  0x00007fffffffe498 in ?? ()
#4  0x00000001ffffe210 in ?? ()
#5  0x0000000000621d10 in ?? ()
#6  0x0000000000400db2 in ?? ()
#7  0x0000000000000000 in ?? ()
{noformat}

summary: options::find::comment() is unused
description: We allow users to set a comment on their find options, but then we don't use this value anywhere.  The comment should be used to track the query, for profiling: https://docs.mongodb.org/manual/reference/method/cursor.comment/#cursor.comment

summary: Enforce compiler minima in CMake
description: See this SO post for details on how to do this: http://stackoverflow.com/questions/14933172/how-can-i-add-a-minimum-compiler-version-requisite

summary: MCI builds that are failing are shown as passing
description:
This build shows as green:

https://evergreen.mongodb.com/task/mongodb_cpp_driver_dev_ubuntu1404_debug_compile_and_test_a0df86e99acab1479650149f8cff9b0a97189ecc_16_01_12_18_22_53

But it didn't actually pass:

https://evergreen.mongodb.com/task_log_raw/mongodb_cpp_driver_dev_ubuntu1404_debug_compile_and_test_a0df86e99acab1479650149f8cff9b0a97189ecc_16_01_12_18_22_53/0?type=T#L1110

Note that this also shows that we need to support GCC 4.8. I will file a a separate ticket for that.

Please note also what happens when CMake fails after the compiler minima change went in:

https://evergreen.mongodb.com/task/mongodb_cpp_driver_dev_ubuntu1404_debug_compile_and_test_e23f9ea61828872a129c89fc8deeaa2647dfd699_16_01_12_18_40_16

Even though the CMake step failed, it still tried to run the tests. We are ignoring failed exit statuses somehow.

summary: Support GCC 4.8.2
description:
Our evergreen builders don't have GCC 4.9, so we need to support GCC 4.8, which is currently considered too old.

We are going to need to #ifdef the max_align_t issue.

summary: Audit all files checked in to git for copyright header
description: This includes CMake files, package config files, findX files, generated headers when possible, etc. Basically, everything. Should go through file by file and add where needed.

summary: b64_ntop.h should be a private header and not installed
description:
The header isn't used publicly. It shouldn't be installed, and should be moved to the 'private' subdirectory.

Additionally, the prelude/postlude macro push/pop can be removed.

summary: Improve bsoncxx polyfill selection options
description: Right now you can specify invalid combinations of poylfill options with CMake. We should make it impossible.

summary: test_driver issues warning that bulk_write update_one requires $ operators
description:
test_driver issues the following warning:

WARNING:       mongoc: mongoc_bulk_operation_update_one(): update_one only works with $ operators.

This error occurs when bulk_write update_one is used without $set. replace_one must be used to replace whole documents. We should find and change the occurrences of update_one without $set.

summary: Remove WriteConcern fsync property
description: The C++11 driver defines an fsync property for the WriteConcern class.  I suggest that it be removed, as the server has not documented its existence even as far back as [2.4|https://docs.mongodb.org/v2.4/reference/write-concern/].  Also see the write concern specification, which [deprecates fsync|https://github.com/mongodb/specifications/blob/master/source/read-write-concern/read-write-concern.rst#fsync] for existing drivers.

summary: Audit all C++ headers and source files for proper includes and include ordering
description: Ensure that all C++ headers and source files are following the proper header discipline for the project.

summary: VS2015 build should default to boost, not mnmlstc
description: The MNMLSTC build doesn't work on VS2015, we should default to using boost if the driver is built with MSVC.

summary: Tag free functions with calling convention macro
description: On windows, free functions may have many different calling conventions, based on compiler switches. We should macro in a hard convention that our free functions are cdecl, much like the legacy driver does.

summary: Productionize clang-format
description: We currently have rudimentary clang-format support, but we don't have the stability guarantees that we have for the server or legacy C++11 driver. We should re-use those mechanisms for the c++11 driver.

summary: mongocxx_mocked in debug requres /bigobj on Windows
description: The compiler errors on mongocxx_mocked in debug builds without {{/bigobj}}.

summary: uri constructor calls .data() on a string_view and passes to libmongoc
description: This is an unsafe operation, since a string_view is not guaranteed to be null terminated.

summary: Fix TODO comments about linking to documentation when available
description: There are several TODO comments of the form "todo add links to docs" or similar. All of those docs should now be published, so we should add the links.

summary: Memory leak detected
description: https://evergreen.mongodb.com/task/mongodb_cpp_driver_dev_ubuntu1410_debug_asan_compile_and_test_4e7c41aaf1ffd6dee8686c690d010444879c5205_16_01_12_21_21_38

summary: Requires.private field occurs twice in....
description:
Hello, folks!

I'm using pkg-config from C++ 11 driver and got this errors from cmake and pkg-config tool:
Requires.private field occurs twice in '/opt/fastnetmon/libraries/mongo_cxx_3_0_0_rc0/lib/pkgconfig/libmongocxx.pc'
Requires.private field occurs twice in '/opt/fastnetmon/libraries/mongo_cxx_3_0_0_rc0/lib/pkgconfig/libmongocxx.pc'
Requires.private field occurs twice in '/opt/fastnetmon/libraries/mongo_cxx_3_0_0_rc0/lib/pkgconfig/libmongocxx.pc'
Requires.private field occurs twice in '/opt/fastnetmon/libraries/mongo_cxx_3_0_0_rc0/lib/pkgconfig/libmongocxx.pc'
Requires.private field occurs twice in '/opt/fastnetmon/libraries/mongo_cxx_3_0_0_rc0/lib/pkgconfig/libmongocxx.pc'
Requires.private field occurs twice in '/opt/fastnetmon/libraries/mongo_cxx_3_0_0_rc0/lib/pkgconfig/libmongocxx.pc'
Requires.private field occurs twice in '/opt/fastnetmon/libraries/mongo_cxx_3_0_0_rc0/lib/pkgconfig/libmongocxx.pc'
Requires.private field occurs twice in '/opt/fastnetmon/libraries/mongo_cxx_3_0_0_rc0/lib/pkgconfig/libmongocxx.pc'
Requires.private field occurs twice in '/opt/fastnetmon/libraries/mongo_cxx_3_0_0_rc0/lib/pkgconfig/libmongocxx.pc'

So you definitely has an issue here:
cat /opt/fastnetmon/libraries/mongo_cxx_3_0_0_rc0/lib/pkgconfig/libmongocxx.pc
Requires.private: libbson-1.0
Requires.private: libmongoc-1.0

But pkg-config documentation (http://people.freedesktop.org/~dbn/pkg-config-guide.html) speaking about another approach for multiple required modules:
Requires.private: libbson-1.0, libmongoc-1.0

Could you fix this?

summary: Add doxygen 'relates' tag docs for all free relational ops
description:
Relational ops need documentation too. Since they aren't members, the way to connect them to the class is to use the doxygen 'relates' tag:

http://www.doxygen.nl/commands.html#cmdrelates

summary: bsoncxx passes non-terminated strings into libbson
Improve bsoncxx doc comments
description:
The following classes in the bsoncxx directory are missing doxygen documentation:

- bsoncxx::array::element
- bsoncxx::array::view::[const_]iterator
- bsoncxx::builder::array::stream_context
- bsoncxx::builder::stream::key_context
- bsoncxx::builder::stream::single_context
- bsoncxx::builder::stream::value_context
- bsoncxx::document::element
- bsoncxx::document::view::[const_]iterator

summary: write example that shows how to handle driver exceptions gracefully
description: Currently all of our examples will crash if something goes wrong. After we sort out our error handling we should write an example that shows people how to Do It Right.

summary: Support lint when run from non-repository root
description: {{Git 1.8.5}} added an option to use {{-C}} to set the git directory. The work around for pre-1.8.5 involves {{--git-dir}} and {{--work-tree}}. Which combination of these options to set depends on the command run.

summary: C++ 11 master driver - can't execute authentification
Update website links to point to C++11 driver api documentation
description:
Several top level sources of api documentation don't have pointers to the C++11 driver docs:

* https://docs.mongodb.org/ecosystem/drivers/
* http://api.mongodb.org/
